title: ModernArch
description: Realistic and modern but still committed to vanilla textures!
body:
![A screenshot showing some textures present in the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J4cajZTT/images/c6a7d3520c9c33927845e2a7d3f5d1a0c18109c3.jpeg) ModernArch is one of the most famous and complete resource packs for Minecraft in terms of realistic modern architecture style, while being committed to the vanilla look of the game. It has received more than 3 million total downloads since its launch. With so many qualities, it is no wonder that ModernArch is one of the most popular resource packs for Minecraft, both among casual players and experienced builders. If you are looking to give your game a modern and realistic touch, this pack is the way to go. It contains custom 3D models, resolutions from 128x to up to 1024x, PBR/POM support and more. **[Fresh Animations Extension pack](https://modrinth.com/project/modernarch-fa-extension)** Shader used for most screenshots is IterationRP.
Check out our Patreon for higher resolutions, get updates sooner, and more benefits:
